tweet_text: 🚨 HUGE NEWS: Turkey secures a spot in the World Cup after defeating Kosovo 1-0, thanks to Kerem Akturkoglu's goal! It's Turkey's first World Cup appearance in 24 years! 🇹🇷⚽️ #WorldCup2026 #TurkeyVsKosovo
article_title: Akturkoglu edges Turkey through to end Kosovo hopes of World Cup finals debut

tweet_text: 🚨 Ten-man Italy fail to qualify for their third consecutive World Cup, losing to Bosnia and Herzegovina in a dramatic penalty shootout! ⚽️🇮🇹 #WorldCup2026 #Italy
article_title: Ten-man Italy miss out on third World Cup in a row
